chapter_info.subject: Social Science
chapter_info.chapter_name: The Gupta Era An Age of Tireless Creativity

flashcards.q: What is the time period associated with the Gupta Empire?
Where was the capital of the Gupta Empire located?
Name the famous iron monument in Delhi that has stood for 1,600 years without rusting.
Which king is identified with the name 'Chandra' on the Mehrauli Iron Pillar?
What is the weight of the Iron Pillar at Mehrauli?
Who was the first major ruler of the Gupta dynasty recognized for early expansion?
What was the ambitious aim of Samudragupta mentioned in his inscriptions?
Which mountain hill in present-day Maharashtra is associated with Prabhāvatī Gupta's temples?
What were the provincial divisions of the Gupta Empire administered through?
flashcards.a: Land grants recorded on copper plates.

flashcards.q: Which dynasty ruled from Kanchipuram and rose to power in the South?
What were the centers of learning called in the Pallava kingdom?
Which kingdom ruled the Brahmaputra valley in modern-day Assam?
What was the ancient name for the Brahmaputra valley of Assam?
Where did Āryabhaṭa live and author his famous astronomical treatise?
According to Āryabhaṭa, what causes the alternation of day and night?
flashcards.a: The Earth spinning on its axis.

flashcards.q: What was the precise length of a year calculated by Āryabhaṭa?
In which city did the encyclopedic scientist Varāhamihira live?
Between whom does the poem 'Meghadūtam' describe a message being sent?
flashcards.a: A yakṣha (banished deity) and his beloved.

flashcards.q: Which deity's mount (vāhana) is the Garuḍa mascot found on Gupta inscriptions?
Which specific sculptures at Ahichchhatra depict India's sacred rivers?
flashcards.a: Ganga (on a makara) and Yamuna (on a tortoise).

flashcards.q: Where are the Dashavatara temples located?
Which cave site is famous for paintings of Bodhisattva Padmapāṇi?
What central Asian tribe repeatedly attacked and weakened the Gupta Empire in the 6th century?
Name the regent ruler who strengthened Gupta-Vākāṭaka ties.
Which major center of learning is associated with Gupta and Vākāṭaka support in many grades?
